module-creator.description: Creates new modules following the project template

create-module.description: Scaffold a new module under modules/
create-module.template: Create a new module at $1 using the module structure from templates/module-template/. Include README.md, theory.md, an example/, tests/, decision.md, and references.md. Use Java 25.

review.description: Review the latest changes against quality gates
review.template: Review the changes in $1 against the project quality gates.

research.template: Research: $1. Consult official sources (JEPs, OpenJDK, Java spec). Provide analysis and references.

adr.description: Create a new Architecture Decision Record
adr.template: Create a new ADR in docs/adr/ following the format of existing ADRs (0001-0004). Number it sequentially.

issue.description: Create a GitHub issue using the appropriate template
issue.template: Create a GitHub issue using one of the templates in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/.

docs.description: Project documentation: vision, roadmap, ADRs, quality gates

templates.description: Reusable project templates for modules and benchmarks
